title: Political rally in Warisnagar draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Warisnagar promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Warisnagar
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Warisnagar constituency.

title: High stakes battle in Warisnagar as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Warisnagar. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.
